tactic: Loss frame -> '137,000 changed that' punch -> mechanism reveal -> recursion
primary_text:
Before 2018, only the wealthy could back an Aussie startup. 137,000 changed that.

The law opened up, Crowd-Sourced Funding arrived, and we built the rails. 324 raises followed: Naked Life, Our Cow, Earthletica, Aquafab. Backing an early Aussie company stopped being VC-only.

Now we are opening our own raise on the platform we built.

Save your spot. We will tell you the moment the offer goes live.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: What only VCs used to access
description: 324 raises. $234M+. 137,000 retail investors. Save your spot.
_source_label: DRC V4 -- A3 Empathy + Access + Recursion (first-timers)
_v4_changes: Hook tightened: 'Before 2018, only the wealthy could invest in an Australian startup. Now 137,000 Australians have.' -> 'Before 2018, only the wealthy could back an Aussie startup. 137,000 changed that.' Same loss-frame DNA and Halbert 5/5, but the punch '137,000 changed that' is a sharper agency frame than 'Now 137,000 Australians have' (the crowd did the changing, not time). 'back' replaces 'invest' so no transaction verb sits near the opener at all.

Para 2 compressed into a tricolon ('The law opened up, Crowd-Sourced Funding arrived, and we built the rails.') replacing V3's three separate short sentences. 'stopped being VC-only' replaces 'stopped being a VC-only thing' to land at 79 words (V3 A3 was 73; V4 keeps the same beats inside the band while sharpening cadence).
Brand grid kept identical to V3 A3 (Naked Life, Our Cow, Earthletica, Aquafab) for recency proof.
_drc_audience: B2C considered, solution-aware. First-time CSF investors who feel locked out of startup equity.
_a_pile_signals: curiosity-gap construct (Before YYYY / only X could)
_compliance_findings_resolved: PREOFFER-VERBS: 'save your spot', 'we will tell you the moment'. No transaction verbs as a CTA; 'back' is the action verb, no 'now/today/here' attached.
VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE: 'we will tell you the moment the offer goes live'. No 'we will send'.
VERBATIM-CSF-WARNING: byte-exact final line, appears exactly once.
BRAND-EXCLUDED: only verified-good raises (Naked Life, Our Cow, Earthletica RAISE-004, Aquafab RAISE-005).
Subject discipline: zero literal 'Birchal' in body; 'the platform we built' + first-person we/our throughout, no referent swap.
